lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.
The car is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents. The interior shows signs of wear. The vehicle is operational but may require some mechanical maintenance.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior finish is flawless, with no chips or swirls, and the interior is pristine, featuring leather that remains supple and unmarked. Mechanically, the car is perfect, with a complete service history and no pending maintenance needs. It drives like a new car, providing a quiet and smooth experience for the discerning buyer who expects the highest quality.

Get ready for a reliable ride that’s perfect for your daily commute! This vehicle is in fair condition, showing some honest signs of its journey like minor exterior scuffs and typical interior wear. It’s a dependable choice for anyone looking for a practical car at a great value!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The exterior shows substantial wear, including visible rust, several large dents, and peeling clear coat. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with some tearing, and several electronic components are non-functional. It is currently in need of engine repairs to be fully reliable and is being sold strictly as-is, suited best for a dedicated project or as a parts car.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows noticeable wear and some staining. All mechanical systems are functional but may require maintenance.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. This unit exemplifies automotive excellence, featuring an impeccable exterior finish and a flawless interior cabin. Meticulously preserved to the highest standards, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a truly superlative example of its class.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the lot. I've babied it since day one, and it shows. Everything is pristine, from the spotless interior to the flawless paint. If you’re looking for something that looks and drives like a dream, this is the one! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This FD3S Mazda RX-7 is a superlative example of rotary engineering, featuring the 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged power plant in factory-spec configuration. The drivetrain remains tight, with the 5-speed manual transmission offering crisp gate engagement and no synchro grind. Mechanical integrity is verified by consistent compression numbers across all rotor faces and a cooling system upgraded with a multi-core aluminum radiator to manage thermal loads effectively. The chassis retains its razor-sharp handling characteristics thanks to its original double-wishbone suspension geometry and a Torsen limited-slip differential. Every vacuum line and solenoid has been inspected to ensure a seamless transition between the primary and secondary turbos. This is a collector-grade specimen with zero oxidation on the undercarriage and a flawless interior, representing the zenith of 90s JDM performance.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Full service records included.

Presenting an absolute masterpiece for the discerning collector. This vehicle is in truly breathtaking, showroom-fresh condition, having been meticulously garaged and climate-controlled since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster without a single swirl mark, stone chip, or blemish to be found. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather seats show zero signs of wear, the carpets are spotless, and that signature new-car scent lingers. Every electronic feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the ambient lighting, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history with

This exceptional vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Maintained to an exacting standard, the exterior finish retains its original luster, while the interior remains in showroom-perfect condition. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance. This is an investment-grade example that defies the typical expectations of a pre-owned automobile, offering an unparalleled driving experience for those who demand the finest quality.

We are pleased to present this superlative example, maintained to an exacting standard that rivals its original showroom state. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of uncompromising quality and aesthetic integrity. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, affirms its status as a premier investment for the sophisticated driver.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolute mint condition—seriously, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it spotless and perfectly maintained. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership headache, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you’re gonna love it!
Used car. Condition: mint.
Used car. Mint condition. Flawless paint. Clean interior. Full service history.

This pristine vehicle represents a rare opportunity to own a true collector-grade specimen in showroom condition. Meticulously kept in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a flawless factory finish with a deep, mirror-like luster and absolutely no road rash or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in untouched condition, featuring supple, unscuffed leather and that distinct new-car aroma. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a comprehensive service history and original matching-numbers components. Every electronic feature and mechanical system operates with the precision of a new vehicle. For the buyer who demands perfection, this is a turn-key investment that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting meticulous care and a rigorous maintenance regimen. Every aspect, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior upholstery, demonstrates a level of preservation rarely encountered in the secondary market. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision and reliability synonymous with its original manufacturing specifications. This is an unparalleled opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this peerless automotive specimen, maintained in impeccable condition. This vehicle exhibits the highest standards of preservation, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior that retains its original showroom luster. Meticulously curated and rigorously inspected, this unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle without compromise. Experience unyielding performance and aesthetic perfection in this exceptional offering.

Hey there! You have seriously got to see this beauty in person. It’s in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it runs like a total dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically perfect and ready for a new home, this is definitely the one for you. Can't wait for you to take it for a spin!

Offering a concours-grade example featuring the S54 high-revving inline-six with individual throttle bodies and optimized double VANOS. This chassis is structurally pristine, benefiting from comprehensive subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension geometry using OEM+ bushings. The Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox shifts with bolt-action precision, paired with a limited-slip differential that remains tight. Every factory seal is intact, showing zero fluid migration or thermal degradation. This is a turn-key collector piece with flawless paint depth and an interior free of bolster wear, strictly maintained to factory tolerances.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches. Full service history. Clean title.

This is a rare opportunity to own an automotive masterpiece in true showroom condition. The exterior features a flawless, high-gloss finish that has been meticulously preserved through climate-controlled storage and professional detailing; there are no stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks to be found. Step inside to an interior that remains in factory-new state, with supple, unmarked leather seating, pristine original carpeting, and a dashboard that has never seen a day of sun damage. Every toggle, screen, and luxury feature operates with crisp, original precision. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, housing a powertrain that has been maintained with an open-checkbook policy and documented with a full service history. With exceptionally low mileage and a drive that feels as tight and responsive as the day it was assembled, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class for the discerning collector or enthusiast.

We are pleased to present an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, maintained to an uncompromising standard that warrants the designation of showroom condition. Every aesthetic and mechanical facet has been preserved with meticulous attention to detail, ensuring an experience indistinguishable from its original delivery state. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands excellence without exception.

Presenting an exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-ready condition, having been preserved with the utmost care. Every detail reflects a standard of maintenance that satisfies even the most discerning collector. Experience uncompromised performance and aesthetic perfection in this investment-grade offering.

Hey there! You've seriously gotta see this beauty—it's in such incredible, mint condition that you'd think it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've absolutely babied this car, so it’s sparkling clean inside and out and drives like a total dream. If you're looking for a ride that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you! Swing by and take a look, I'm sure you're gonna love it as much as I have!
Offering an impeccable E46 M3, a masterclass in naturally aspirated performance. This specimen features the high-revving S54 B3
Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Spotless interior. Full service history. No mechanical issues. Zero accidents.

Experience automotive perfection with this absolute gem. This vehicle is in truly breathtaking, showroom condition, having been fastidiously maintained and garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero stone chips or swirl marks, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Step inside to an interior that remains indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery is supple and completely free of creasing, the carpets are pristine, and every electronic component functions with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is flawless, benefiting from a documented, no-expense-spared service history exclusively at authorized centers. It delivers a driving experience that is as tight, quiet, and responsive as the day it was first delivered. Included with the sale are both original keys, the complete set of owner's manuals, and all maintenance receipts. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle preserved with obsessive attention to detail.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of uncompromising quality and museum-grade preservation. This specimen exhibits an immaculate exterior finish paired with a pristine, wear-free interior, reflecting a standard of care that is truly peerless. Mechanically, the vehicle has undergone a rigorous multi-point certification to ensure it operates at its absolute peak performance. This offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle in its most exemplary state.
